statement: Northstar Grid Components reported that monthly order intake rose by 6% from the prior month after utility customers advanced replacement transformer purchases.
evidence_text: Northstar Grid Components reported monthly order intake rose 6% from the prior month, citing replacement transformer purchases by utility customers.

metadata.source_title: Northstar Grid Components Weekly Fixture Update

statement: Tender notices in the fixture highlight long lead times for transformers and switchgear.
evidence_text: Grid-modernization tender notices highlighted transformer and switchgear lead times as schedule risks for replacement programs.

statement: A regional storage integrator disclosed that two container shipments were delayed for inspection.
evidence_text: The regional storage integrator disclosed two battery-container shipments were delayed for inspection before site delivery.
